title: Notify Me — AI-Powered Personalized Daily News Briefing
description: AI-powered personalized daily news briefing app built for Hack-a-Sprint 2026. Uses Claude API with web_search tool to fetch and summarize real-time news across configurable categories (tech, AI, finance, security, etc.). Features an Inkbox AI agent identity (@notify-me) for automated email delivery of briefings every morning at 8 AM EST. Includes RAG-based article deduplication using Vectra + HuggingFace embeddings, Obsidian vault MCP integration for cross-referencing past research, interactive chat for deep-diving into articles with Claude, and optional ElevenLabs TTS for podcast-style audio briefings. Stack: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui, Express, Claude API (BYOK), Inkbox SDK, Vectra, SQLite, node-cron. Built with Claude Code using subagent-driven development.
